title: Translating SQL Queries to NoSQL Query Expressions with Aggregations
scenario: A user wants to translate a complex SQL query with aggregations into an equivalent NoSQL query expression. The NoSQL query expression must be readable, maintainable, and efficient. The user needs help on how to define the query expression and handle aggregations such as grouping and sorting. The target NoSQL query expression must be accurate and optimized for the NoSQL database.
constraints: Must use the latest NoSQL query syntax
Must include a brief explanation of the translation process

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the SQL to NoSQL query translation
The readability and maintainability of the NoSQL query expression
The validity and optimization of the NoSQL query syntax used
The quality and clarity of the explanation provided
